mainEntity.name: What if Perplexity cites inaccurate info about my Phoenix firm?
mainEntity.text: What if Perplexity cites inaccurate info about my Phoenix firm?

acceptedAnswer.text: Request correction via Perplexity feedback; publish rebuttal content optimized to override.

suggestedAnswer.text: Monitor daily; cite primary sources like firm site. Phoenix ethics rules guide responses.

name: Handling Perplexity Errors Phoenix
description: Request correction via Perplexity feedback; publish rebuttal content optimized to override.
